description.en: You soak in solar energy and prepare to unleash a devastating beam. When you use this move as an action you simply begin to collect energy. description.en: You break off a few sharp shards of rock, which begin to levitate around you. You create 3 shards which float around you until you trigger them. When you are hit by an attack you may use your reaction to interpose shards between yourself and the attack. For each shard you use in this way you gain +1 AC versus the triggering attack. On a hit you deal 1d4+1 points of rock damage for each shard you used to attack. Once a shard damages an opponent in this way, your link with it dissipates and you can no longer control it for this use of Stealth Rock.

description.en: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing at a point of your choice within range. The webs fill a 20-foot cube from that point for the duration. The webs are difficult terrain and lightly obscure their area. Webs layered over a flat surface have a depth of 5 feet. Each creature that starts its turn in the webs or that enters them during its turn must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is restrained as long as it remains in the webs or until it breaks free. A creature restrained by the webs can use its actions to make a Strength check against your MOVE DC. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained. The webs are flammable. Any 5-foot cube of webs exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, dealing 2d4 fire damage to any creature that starts its turn in the fire.

description.en: You create in your stomach a stockpile of flem and digested materials. You add a stack of Stockpile to yourself. You can have up to 5 stacks of Stockpile at one time. These temporary hit points are unique and can stack with other temporary hit points from Stockpile. These stacks last for only for the duration of this move and all disappear when the first stack runs out its duration. You may choose to lose all your stacks of Stockpile at any time. If you lose your stacks of stockpile for any reason you lose the AC and temporary hit points from this move.
